note: Net-deflationary verify: 1 REFUTE (A8 intersection-blindness), 1 REFINE (S5 demotion bounded), 2 CONFIRM (A7-1, A2).

claim: REFINE: mechanism REAL (no-.similarity row falls to rrfScore ~0.03, sinks below ~0.5 cosine hits) BUT head-only permutation (headCount=min(10,len), length+membership invariant hybrid-search.ts:2433,2444) — never EVICTS, only lowers rank within top-10; frequency bounded by vector-lane coverage (lexical-exclusive vector-miss docs only, uncommon). A/B still worth running but small effect size.

REFUTE the 'structurally blind to recall additions' headline: ndcgDelta is computeNDCG(condenseJudgedRanking(shadowRanked)) - computeNDCG(liveRanked) (rank-metrics.ts:268-274); condenseJudgedRanking keeps ALL judged items (:66-70) so a judged ADDED result DOES move ndcgDelta. Blind only for the per-result deltas/counts (:246-247) and for UNLABELED added items (a qrels-coverage issue). The CLASS-C recall panel is still useful but its justification changes from 'gate is blind' to 'recall sensitivity is implicit + coverage-limited'.

CONFIRM A7-1's LLM-free premise: determineAction(similarity) is pure threshold (reconsolidation.ts:202); grep LLM/anthropic/openai/claude/gpt/fetch/chat/completion = EMPTY; similarity via findSimilar K-NN callback, embedding via optional injected callback — no model called inside. Safe to graft into the reindex scan.

CONFIRM: fitCalibration ZERO non-test callers (grep); no ECE/Brier/reliabilityDiagram/calibrationError symbol anywhere under lib/; isotonic apply inert by default (maybeCalibrate returns raw unless isConfidenceCalibrationEnabled env-flag AND a model file loads, confidence-scoring.ts:188-191). Minor: one env-flag + model-file-presence, not two boolean flags — phantom holds.

A8 was the campaign's most-overstated claim: correctly observed the per-result deltas/counts loop is intersection-only, then over-extended to ndcgDelta asserting recall additions contribute ZERO — code refutes this (ndcgDelta computed over the full condensed shadow ranking). The 'structurally blind to recall additions' headline is wrong for the very metric (ndcgDelta) it named.
